title: Bellum
description: Weapons, tools, and chaos. All part of warfare...
body:
This is all about unique weapons/tools with special properties to fit anyones' needs.
Content - Sickle: has a custom bleeding effect that stops natural and all forms of regeneration. - Scythe: similar to a sword but more range and can be used a giant hoe!! - Dagger: less damage than a sword but higher attack speed, perfect for combo attacks. - Kunai: only comes in all materials (1.1.4+), can be tipped by a potion and thrown to hurt and afflict the effect to the target. - Reaping Enchantment: for sickles, it can attract mobs towards the player, side effect: removes the bleeding ability. - Attune Enchantment: for trident, it allows riptide without water at the cost of health, can only be obtained be killing elder guardian with a trident Changes: - Potions and enchanted books and buckets can be stacked to 16 - Ender pearls and eggs and snowballs can be stacked to 64
